summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin Features: Customer Management, Reseller Sources, Order Statuses, and Order PDF Generation. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows working correctly.

issues: Console warning about <span> inside <tbody> - hydration issue, but doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
API URLs correctly use environment variables
Error handling present for both frontend and backend
All system statuses are properly protected from deletion
Customer delete protection works correctly (blocks delete when customer has orders)
Minor: DashboardPage has HTML structure issue with <span> inside <tbody> causing hydration warning
seed_data_creation: Created test customer via UI, created test reseller source via UI
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P1 admin features fully functional. Customer Management, Reseller Sources, Order Statuses, and Order PDF generation all tested and working. Settings page has 3 tabs as required.

1_customer_management_page.details: Page loads at /admin/customers with title, search box, Add Customer button, and customer list table

2_customer_create.details: Create Customer modal opens, form fields work (name, phone, email, address, city, state, pincode, notes), saves successfully with toast notification

3_customer_read.details: Customer list shows Customer ID, Name, Phone, Email, Orders count, Created date, Actions

4_customer_update.details: Edit button opens modal with pre-filled data, updates persist correctly

5_customer_delete.details: Delete button works, customers with orders are protected from deletion

6_customer_details_order_history.details: View button opens Customer Details modal with Customer ID, Name, Total Orders, Total Spent, contact info, and Order History section

7_settings_page_tabs.details: Settings page has 3 tabs: Order Rules, Reseller Sources, Order Statuses

8_order_rules_tab.details: Shows Reseller Edit Time Limit and Admin Visibility Delay inputs with Order Rules Summary

9_reseller_sources_crud.details: List shows sources with Active badges, Add Source button opens modal, create/edit/delete all working

10_order_statuses_crud.details: All 6 system statuses displayed with colors and System badges, Add Status button for custom statuses, system statuses protected from deletion

11_admin_orders_pdf_button.details: PDF button (FileText icon) visible in Actions column with data-testid='pdf-order-{orderId}'

12_order_details_modal.details: Modal shows customer info, Configuration with fabric images, Styling Options with images, Measurements & Allowances table
